g.text: Each room follows a different life-course pattern

text.style: font-size: 16px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #4a4a4a

g.text: Small multiples use the same y-axis scale so room sizes are comparable across age groups.

text.style: font-size: 10.5px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #666666

g.text: Source: 2024 American Time Use Survey, U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics.
